title: Case Processing Centre in Mississauga, Ontario - Canada.ca
content:
## Case Processing Centre in Mississauga, Ontario
Not open to the public
The IRCC office at 2 Robert Speck Parkway, known as the Case Processing Centre in Mississauga, only processes digitized applications and documents. If you can’t apply online or use the IRCC Web form to send us documents we requested, you must send your application or documents to our digitization office in Nova Scotia. That office will digitize them for processing.
Right of permanent residence fee payments or other correspondence
ATTN: CPC-M IRCC Digitization Centre PO Box 12153, Station A Sydney, NS B1P 0L1 Canada
We accept deliveries from couriers from 8:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m. , Monday through Friday, except for statutory holidays.
We don’t accept deliveries before or after these hours.
ATTN: CPC-M IRCC Digitization Centre 3050 Wilson Avenue New Waterford, NS B1H 5V8 Canada
